title: myriophyllum simplicifolium
intro: Myriophyllum simplicifolium, also known as the simple water milfoil, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Haloragaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Myriophyllum simplicifolium include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and act as an antimicrobial agent, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for skin and wound care. Herbal preparations of Myriophyllum simplicifolium include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
